Body: User reported this started after the latest Windows update. Escalating to the hardware team.
Checked the event logs — memory dump points to a driver conflict with the GPU.
Rolled back the GPU driver. Monitoring for recurrence.
Confirmed on our end — the SSO token provider is returning a 503. Investigating.
SSO service restarted. Asking affected employees to retry.
Checked the printer IP — it changed after the router was replaced. Updating the port config now.
Issue isolated to machines running Office 365 build 16.0.17126. Rolling back to previous build.
Rollback applied on both machines. Outlook is stable. Closing pending confirmation from users.
Request approved by manager. Checking inventory for available monitors.
Reproduced the issue internally. Looks like a MTU size mismatch on the VPN gateway.
Pushed a config update to the gateway. Asking remote employees to test and report back.
License renewed for 12 months. All team members should have access restored.
Keyboard replaced with a spare from storage.
Permissions were reset by a script during maintenance. Restored the correct ACL for the marketing folder.
Confirmed with the marketing lead — access is working again. Closing ticket.
GitHub and Slack accounts created. Working on Jira and internal systems access.
